title: Podman fail to pull image from docker.io
body:
### Issue Description

I try to deploy a new app with podman (plausible analytics) but podman fail to retrieve the image from docker.io

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. create [this](https://privatebin.alrhome.net/?13b9e14739ba8bf7#3mQTNQ19UnSbw5ycRMzqGwtT4LmyW5mgV3rTQSueqanu) quadlet file
2.Activate it with systemd
3.It fails to download the image


### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

### Describe the results you expected

Podman should retrieve the image

### podman info output

```yaml
I run UniversalBlue 42 CoreOS (a fork of fedora coreos, very similar) with podman 5.6.0
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

The log when it fails to retrieve the image is : 

```
Sep 19 11:54:49 webserver-vm db[9554]: Trying to pull docker.io/library/postgres:latest...
Sep 19 11:54:49 webserver-vm db[9554]: Pulling image //postgres:latest inside systemd: setting pull timeout to 5m0s
Sep 19 11:54:50 webserver-vm systemd[8241]: db.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE
```

Thanks you a lot for your help!

comments.body: That should redirect to ` docker.io/library/postgres`, can you `podman pull docker.io/library/postgres` at least?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
